channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Federal Judge Questions Legality of Maurene Comey's Firing by Trump Administration
item.description: During a pretrial hearing in New York, a federal judge challenged a Department of Justice lawyer over the dismissal of Maurene Comey, daughter of former FBI Director James Comey. Maurene Comey, a DOJ ...

item.title: NCDC Reports 204 Lassa Fever Deaths with Rising Fatality Rate in Nigeria
item.description: The Nigeria Centre for Disease Control and Prevention (NCDC) don report say 204 people don die from Lassa fever so far dis year, as the disease fatality rate dey increase despite small drop in new cas...

item.title: Southern Alberta warns of rising Bow River levels and potential nuisance flooding
item.description: A wet weekend is forecast across southern Alberta with rising Bow River levels and the possibility of flooding in Banff National Park. Environment Canada predicts rainfall starting Saturday and contin...

item.title: SAPS investigates explosions at Woolworths stores in Free State and Gauteng
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) has initiated a high-level investigation following explosions at Woolworths retail stores in both the Free State and Gauteng provinces. According to police stat...

item.title: Stella reacts strongly to Matthew's unexpected hug attempt in The Alibi Episode 53
item.description: In Episode 53 of the popular Filipino TV series 'The Alibi,' viewers witness a tense moment between Stella and Matthew. The scene revolves around Matthew attempting to hug Stella, which visibly annoys...

item.title: New Triassic crocodile relative reveals ostrich-like body plan and early archosaur evolution
item.description: Scientists have identified a newly described prehistoric species, Labrujasuchus expectatus, an unusual crocodile relative from the Late Triassic period that challenges traditional ideas about early ar...

item.title: Joao Fonseca defeats Novak Djokovic, halting his pursuit of a 25th Grand Slam title
item.description: Novak Djokovic’s pursuit of a historic 25th Grand Slam title has been brought to an abrupt halt after he was defeated by Brazilian teenager Joao Fonseca. The result marks a significant upset in men’s ...

item.title: Profile of Lydia Millen: British YouTuber, Fitness Enthusiast and Lifestyle Influencer
item.description: Lydia Elise Millen is a British YouTuber and lifestyle influencer who has built a strong following through her videos on fashion, makeup, fitness, and general lifestyle. Born on 14 April 1988 in Watfo...

item.title: New Texas Senate Poll Shows Tight Race Between Ken Paxton and James Talarico
item.description: A new poll from the Texas Public Opinion Research group suggests a competitive U.S. Senate race in Texas, with Democratic state lawmaker James Talarico leading Republican Attorney General Ken Paxton 4...

item.title: Search suspended for Umhlanga businessman after suspected drowning incident at Hazelmere Dam during birthday outing
item.description: Emergency services have suspended a search operation for a 54-year-old Umhlanga businessman who is presumed to have drowned at Hazelmere Dam during a birthday celebration on Friday. According to witne...

item.title: Original Creator Criticizes BuzzFeed and Amazon for Using AI to Animate Cuppy Without Consent
item.description: Loryn Brantz, the creator of the viral Good Advice Cupcake character, is publicly criticizing BuzzFeed and Amazon for licensing her character for a new AI-assisted animated series called Cupcake & Fri...

item.title: Stephenville Officials Review Handling of WWII-era Explosive in Residential Area
item.description: Stephenville Mayor Bob Byrnes expressed concern after the RCMP transported a suspected Second World War-era explosive shell to a residential neighbourhood, causing distress among locals. The device, d...

item.title: Winnipeg authorities warn about high-risk sex offender living in the city
item.description: Winnipeg police have announced that Marinus Willemse, a 59-year-old convicted sex offender released from federal prison in British Columbia, is considered high risk to reoffend and is slated to reside...

item.title: Africa and Global Preparedness for Future Pandemics Needs Urgent Action
item.description: As Ebola outbreak hit middle of May 2026, WHO drop report wey show say di world still dey weak for pandemic preparedness. Di report, titled 'A World on the Edge: Priorities for a Pandemic-Resilient Fu...

item.title: Three climbers die after fall near Denali Pass on Mount McKinley in Alaska
item.description: Three climbers have died and a fourth is in critical condition following a fall near Denali Pass on Mount McKinley (Denali) in Alaska, North America’s highest peak. The incident occurred on Wednesday ...

item.title: Weak Consumer Conditions Could Shape the Fed’s Next Moves
item.description: The article argues that the U.S. economy is increasingly split between strong corporate performance and weaker household conditions. While businesses continue to post solid results, consumers and the ...

item.title: Authorities monitor rising anti-immigrant tensions as fears of violence grow in South Africa
item.description: South African authorities and civil society organisations are raising concerns over growing anti-immigrant tensions ahead of 30 June, after social media threats suggested possible mobilisation against...

item.title: US federal judge blocks attempt to rename or close Kennedy Center under Trump directive
item.description: A federal judge in Washington, D.C. has issued an injunction preventing any attempt to rename the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts after Donald Trump or to shut it down under his directi...

item.title: Maki discusses creative process of ‘Habangbuhay Pansamantala’ music video at Pink Fest
item.description: Filipino music artist Maki recently opened up about the creative journey behind his single ‘Habangbuhay Pansamantala’ and its accompanying music video during his appearance at Pink Fest. In the event,...

item.title: Johannesburg court activates suspended sentence of fake lawyer over unpaid restitution
item.description: A bogus attorney in Johannesburg, Zuko Madikane, has finally had his suspended three-year prison sentence activated after failing to pay R44,000 in court-ordered restitution to a businessman he defrau...
